title: Digital Twin Change Contract (DTC)
description: Approved DTC body, fingerprinted, the sole write-back gate input. Independently versioned from SIC per ADR-004. A genuine 3-verdict terminal state machine (P230 section 3.1), not a binary pass/fail. Runtime-neutral. Real content P330.

sicFingerprint.description: The exact approved SIC body fingerprint this DTC was proposed against (binds DTC to SIC by fingerprint, not by a mutable pointer).

status.description: Matches P230's confirmed legacy status union, carried forward.

bodyFingerprint.description: sha256 content hash of the exact approved DTC body.

verdict.description: 3-verdict terminal outcome (P230 section 3.1: 'digital_twin_contract_finalized' verdict union); present once finalized.

reasonCode.description: Stable code from contracts/reason-code-registry.json; required context on a dtc-rejected or dtc-aborted verdict.
